---
title: "‘Two Popular Novelists of the 'Fifties and Their Publisher: Letters from G. J. Whyte-Melville and Charlotte M. Yonge to John William Parker, Jr.’"
---

## ‘Two Popular Novelists of the 'Fifties and Their Publisher: Letters from G. J. Whyte-Melville and Charlotte M. Yonge to John William Parker, Jr.’

**Author:** David Bonnell Green
**Date:** 1963
**Imprint:** <i>Notes & Queries </i>10, 450-454

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
